_comment: Copy this file to pipeline/templates/<template-id>.local.json and fill it. The .local.json is gitignored and never committed. This starter shows the shape only; every block body is null. An analytics overview presents channel performance; every number is filled at assembly time from a human-saved analytics export passed via --data, never baked into the template and never estimated.
_boundary: Metrics come only from the supplied export; a missing metric stays bracketed and gapped, never estimated (protocols/no-fabrication.md).
_write_discipline: Templates are written by the human only. template-ingest PROPOSES a template from an uploaded example and the human reviews, edits, and saves the .local.json by hand. No atom or tool ever writes a template file.
_authorship_boundary: The system never authors block body text. Assembly only substitutes [BRACKETED_FIELDS] and includes, excludes, or swaps whole blocks; it never edits, rephrases, or composes body text.

conditions: include only when benchmark rows in canonical-sources/rate-benchmarks/benchmarks.json carry sourced values; null benchmark rows are never quoted
include when the creator wants an interpretation section; the body is a creator-approved block saved into the template, never composed at assembly time
